name: Taelia Delarosa | Demon Dealings
description:
Had this bot in the backlog of my many bots, decided to offload this for ya. Of course, since it’s Yamathegod we’re talking about here, this will be potential noncon

This could either be an instant loss, some great friendship opportunities, or the greatest boss battle known to man.

—————————————————————

Now [little slime] do you [agree or disagree] to the [WACKY SHENANIGANS] that [Lurk in the shadows]???

Cause it’s Janitor.AI, this very well could turn into something vile, so this is the final warning for the faint of heart.

—————————————————————

Though as I say that, you could just befriend the demon, so it’s whatever.

Now whats the premise of the bot? You may ask. You see, Taelia wants revenge, so she do be summoning a demon to… ahem

Checks first message

To non-consensually have intercourse with her most aggravating enemies? Seems like a bit much, doesn’t it? But as her friend, you have a choice ahead. Better hope that choice is the right one.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
